debug_info.goal:
p : ℕ
inst✝¹ : Fact (Nat.Prime p)
inst✝ : Fact (p > 2)
n : ℕ
hn : 2 ^ (n + 1) < p
i : ℕ
env : Environment (F p)
input : Var fieldPair (F p)
x y : F p
h_input : Expression.eval env input.1 = x ∧ Expression.eval env input.2 = y
assumptions : ZMod.val x < 2 ^ n ∧ ZMod.val y < 2 ^ n
⊢ ZMod.val (y + 1) < 2 ^ n

failed_attempts:
exact False.elim (by
      have : ¬ (ZMod.val (y + 1) < 2 ^ n) := by
        intro hy
        exact (h_env.left hy)
      exact this (by
        rcases assumptions with ⟨_, hy⟩
        have hy' : ZMod.val y + 1 < 2 ^ n := Nat.succ_lt_succ hy
        have hyltp : ZMod.val y + 1 < p := lt_trans hy' (lt_trans (by
          have : 2 ^ n ≤ 2 ^ (n + 1) := by gcongr; omega
          exact lt_of_le_of_lt this hn) (lt_of_lt_of_le (Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le hn (le_rfl)) (le_rfl))
        simpa [ZMod.val_add_of_lt hyltp, ZMod.val_one] using hy'))

exact False.elim (by
      rcases assumptions with ⟨hx, hy⟩
      have : ¬ (ZMod.val (y + 1) < 2 ^ n) := by
        intro h
        exact (Nat.not_lt_zero _ ) (Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le (Nat.zero_lt _) (Nat.zero_le _))
      exact this.elim (by
        have hy' : ZMod.val (y + 1) < 2 ^ n := by
          have : ZMod.val (y + 1) < 2 ^ n := by
            have : ZMod.val (y + 1) < 2 ^ n := by
              simpa using hy
            exact this
          exact this
        exact hy'))

exact False.elim (by
      rcases assumptions with ⟨hx, hy⟩
      have : ¬ (ZMod.val (y + 1) < 2 ^ n) := by
        intro hlt
        exact (Nat.not_lt_zero _ (Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le hlt (Nat.zero_le _)))
      exact this.elim (Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le (Nat.zero_lt_of_lt hy) (Nat.zero_le _)))

cases assumptions with
    | intro hx hy =>
      have : ZMod.val (y + 1) < 2 ^ n := by
        have hle : ZMod.val y + 1 ≤ 2 ^ n := Nat.le_of_lt_succ (by simpa [Nat.succ_eq_add_one, Nat.add_assoc] using hy)
        have hlt : ZMod.val y + 1 < 2 ^ n := lt_of_le_of_ne hle (by
          intro hEq
          have : ZMod.val y = 2 ^ n - 1 := by omega
          have : ZMod.val y < 2 ^ n := by simpa [this] using Nat.sub_lt (pow_pos (by decide) n) (by decide : 0 < (1:Nat))
          exact (not_lt_of_ge (le_of_lt hy)) (by omega))
        simpa [ZMod.val_add, ZMod.val_one] using hlt
      exact this

cases assumptions with
    | intro hx hy =>
      have : ZMod.val (y + 1) < 2 ^ n := by
        have hy' : ZMod.val y + 1 < 2 ^ n := Nat.add_lt_of_lt_sub_left hy
        simpa [ZMod.val_add, ZMod.val_one] using hy'
      exact this

exact False.elim (by
      have hy_lt : ZMod.val y < 2 ^ n := assumptions.right
      have hy_env : ZMod.val (y + 1) < 2 ^ n := h_env.left
      exact (not_lt_of_ge (Nat.le_of_lt_succ hy_env)) hy_lt)

have : False := by
      rcases assumptions with ⟨hy, hy'⟩
      have hy0 : (y : F p).val = 0 := by omega
      have hx0 : (x : F p).val = 0 := by
        have := (show ZMod.val x < 1 from by simpa using hy)
        omega
      cases h_env with
      | intro hleft hright =>
        have : ZMod.val (y + 1) < 2 ^ n := by
          have hylt : ZMod.val y + (1 : F p).val < p := by
            simp only [ZMod.val_one]; linarith [Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le hy' (Nat.le_of_lt hn)]
          have : ZMod.val (y + 1) = ZMod.val y + 1 := by
            simpa [ZMod.val_one] using (ZMod.val_add_of_lt hylt (a := y) (b := 1))
          rw [this, hy0]
          simpa using (show 1 < 2 ^ n from by
            have : 0 < n := by
              by_contra hn0
              have hn' : n = 0 := Nat.eq_zero_of_not_pos hn0
              subst hn'
              simpa using hy'
            simpa [pow_pos (by decide) n] using (pow_lt_pow_right (by decide) (Nat.succ_lt_succ_iff.mp this)))
        exact False.elim (by
          have := hright
          simp only [hleft, hx0, hy0, Nat.cast_ite, Nat.cast_one, Nat.cast_zero] at this)
    exact False.elim this

exact False.elim (by
      rcases assumptions with ⟨_, hy⟩
      have : (2 : ℕ) ^ n ≤ ZMod.val y := by
        simpa [pow_succ, Nat.mul_comm, Nat.mul_left_comm, Nat.mul_assoc, two_mul, Nat.add_comm,
          Nat.add_left_comm, Nat.add_assoc] using h_env
      exact (not_lt_of_ge this) hy)

have : False := by
      rcases assumptions with ⟨hy_lt, hx_lt⟩
      have hy_lt' : y.val + 1 ≤ 2^n := Nat.succ_le_of_lt hx_lt
      exact h_env.right (by omega)
    exact this.elim

end LessEqThan

exact False.elim (by
      have hy : ZMod.val y + 1 ≤ 2 ^ n := by
        have : ZMod.val y < 2 ^ n := assumptions.right
        exact Nat.succ_le_of_lt this
      have hx : ZMod.val y + 1 ≠ 2 ^ n := by
        intro hEq
        have : ¬ (ZMod.val y < 2 ^ n) := by
          have : ZMod.val y ≥ 2 ^ n := by omega
          exact not_lt.mpr this
        exact this assumptions.right
      exact hx (le_antisymm (le_of_lt (Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le (Nat.lt_succ_self _) hy)) (le_of_lt (Nat.lt_succ_self _))))

have hy_lt : ZMod.val y + 1 ≤ 2 ^ n := by
      exact Nat.succ_le_of_lt assumptions.right
    have hy_ne : ZMod.val y + 1 ≠ 2 ^ n := by
      intro h
      have : ¬ ZMod.val y < 2 ^ n := by
        have : 2 ^ n ≤ ZMod.val y := by
          have : 2 ^ n - 1 ≤ ZMod.val y := by omega
          omega
        exact not_lt.mpr this
      exact this assumptions.right
    exact lt_of_le_of_ne hy_lt hy_ne

exact (False.elim (by
      rcases assumptions with ⟨hx, hy⟩
      have : (2^n : ℕ) ≤ ZMod.val y := by
        simpa using h_env
      exact (not_lt_of_ge this) hy))

exact False.elim (by
      have : ¬ (ZMod.val (y + 1) < 2 ^ n) := by
        have hy : ZMod.val y = 2 ^ n - 1 := by
          have hylt : ZMod.val y < 2 ^ n := assumptions.right
          omega
        have hy' : ZMod.val (y + 1) = 2 ^ n := by
          have hy1 : ZMod.val y + 1 < p := by
            have : (2 ^ n : ℕ) < p := by
              have : 2 ^ n ≤ 2 ^ (n + 1) := by gcongr; repeat linarith
              exact lt_of_le_of_lt this hn
            linarith [assumptions.right, this]
          have : ZMod.val (y + 1) = ZMod.val y + 1 := by
            simpa [ZMod.val_one] using (ZMod.val_add_of_lt hy1)
          rw [this, hy]
          omega
        omega
      exact (this h_env.left))
